name: Pradhan Mantri Jan Dhan Yojana
desc: Ensures access to banking, pensions, and insurance for every family.

name: Skill India Mission
desc: Improves employability and entrepreneurship with certification and digital skilling.
bullets: Focus on AI, robotics, green energy

name: Make in India
desc: Makes India a hub for manufacturing, design, and innovation.

name: Swachh Bharat Abhiyan
desc: Targets cleaner cities and villages and better public health.

name: Saansad Adarsh Gram Yojana
desc: MP-led initiative to develop model villages through community participation.

name: Shramev Jayate Karyakram
desc: Labour reforms to make compliance transparent through a unified portal.

name: Mission Indradhanush
desc: Immunisation drive to cover children and pregnant women.

name: Beti Bachao Beti Padhao
desc: Encourages gender balance and continued schooling for girls.

name: HRIDAY
desc: Urban programme to conserve and revitalise heritage cities.

name: Pradhan Mantri Mudra Yojana
desc: Collateral-free loans for micro and small enterprises.
bullets: Promotes job creation and financial inclusion

name: UJALA Scheme
desc: Provides cheap energy-saving LED bulbs and fans to homes.

name: PM Suraksha Bima Yojana
desc: Low-cost accidental insurance for eligible bank account holders.

name: PM Jeevan Jyoti Bima Yojana
hi: प्रधान मंत्री जीवन ज्योति बीमा योजना
desc: Low-cost term life insurance linked to savings accounts.

name: AMRUT
desc: Urban mission to provide basic services like water supply and sewerage.

name: PM Awas Yojana (Urban)
desc: Affordable housing for urban poor with credit-linked subsidy.

name: PM Gramin Awas Yojana
desc: Rural housing scheme for pucca houses with basic facilities.

name: PM Ujjwala Yojana
desc: Deposit-free LPG connections for women from eligible households.

name: Digital India
desc: Transforms service delivery through digital infrastructure.

name: PM Vidyalakshmi Scheme
desc: Financial support for students pursuing quality higher education.

name: UDAY Scheme
desc: Financial and operational turnaround for state power distribution companies.

name: PM Jan Arogya Yojana
desc: Publicly funded health insurance for poor and vulnerable families.

name: PM Kisan Samman Nidhi
desc: Income support to eligible farmer families paid into bank accounts.

name: Svamitva Yojana
desc: Property cards for rural households through drone-based mapping.

name: Amrit Bharat Station Scheme
desc: Long-term plan to modernise railway stations with better amenities.

name: Jeevan Pramaan
desc: Digital Life Certificate for pensioners using Aadhaar authentication.
bullets: No physical presence needed at banks

name: Deen Dayal Upadhyay Gram Jyoti Yojana
hi: दीन दयाल उपाध्याय ग्राम ज्योति योजना
desc: Rural electrification for reliable power supply in villages.
bullets: Feeder separation for agriculture and homes

name: DDU Grameen Kaushalya Yojana
hi: दीन दयाल उपाध्याय ग्रामीण कौशल्य योजना
desc: Placement-linked skilling for rural youth from poor and vulnerable groups.
bullets: Focus on poor and vulnerable groups

name: Smart Cities Mission
desc: Smart solutions for core infrastructure, mobility and governance in cities.

name: PM Fasal Bima Yojana
desc: Crop insurance to protect farmers against yield loss from natural risks.

name: Stand Up India
desc: Bank loans for SC/ST and women entrepreneurs to set up enterprises.
bullets: One SC/ST and one woman borrower per branch

name: PM Matsya Sampada Yojana
desc: Fisheries scheme to raise production, productivity and value addition.

name: SMILE Scheme
desc: Employment for transgender persons through skill development.

name: PM Ucchatar Siksha Protsahan
desc: Scholarships to strengthen higher education for economically weak students.
bullets: Direct payment to students and institutions
For UG, PG and professional courses

name: PM DAKSH
desc: Skilling and entrepreneurship for SC, OBC, EBC and DNT communities.
bullets: Focus on wage and self-employment skills

name: PM Internship Scheme
desc: Structured internships for students and graduates in top Indian companies.

name: PM Bharatiya Janausadhi Yojana
desc: Quality generic medicines at affordable prices through Janaushadhi Kendras.

name: PM Gramin Digital Saksharta Abhiyan
desc: Mass digital literacy programme for rural households.
bullets: Trains on devices, internet, emails, payments

name: PM KUSUM
hi: पीएम किसान ऊर्जा सुरक्षा एवं उत्थान महाभियान
desc: Solar pumps and grid-connected solar plants for farmers.
bullets: Three-part scheme covering solar plants and pumps
Cuts diesel use and boosts farmer income

name: PM Poshan
desc: Nutritious hot cooked meals for schoolchildren for better health.
bullets: Focus on calories, protein and micronutrients
Locally grown food and nutrition gardens

name: PM Matru Vandana Yojana
desc: Cash incentives for pregnant and lactating women.
bullets: Encourages early registration and antenatal care

name: PM Garib Kalyan Yojana
desc: Umbrella welfare scheme including free foodgrains and direct benefit transfers.
bullets: Free wheat, rice and pulses monthly
Cash to 20 crore women Jan Dhan holders
Insurance for COVID frontline health workers

name: National Handicrafts Development Programme
desc: Institutional support for artisans through training, design and marketing.

name: PM Surakshit Matritva Abhiyan
desc: Specialist antenatal care services for pregnant women on fixed days.

name: Janani Suraksha Yojana
desc: Cash transfer to promote institutional deliveries among pregnant women.
bullets: Links women to accredited health facilities

name: Janani Shishu Suraksha Karyakram
desc: Free drugs, diagnostics and transport for pregnant women and sick newborns.
bullets: No user charges in government hospitals
Free transport from home and drop-off after delivery
Free drugs, diagnostics and blood provision

name: PM TB Mukt Bharat Abhiyan
desc: Accelerates TB elimination through community participation and patient support.

name: Niramaya Health Insurance
desc: Health insurance for persons with specified disabilities.
bullets: No age limit or pre-insurance medical tests

name: Rashtriya Arogya Nidhi
desc: Financial assistance for poor patients needing high-cost treatment.

name: National Livestock Mission
desc: Comprehensive programme to improve livestock productivity.

name: Mission Shakti
desc: Umbrella scheme for women's safety, security and empowerment.
bullets: Partners with states and civil society

name: PM Fellowship for Doctoral Research
desc: Industry-academia fellowship for PhD scholars on applied research.

name: SERB International Research Experience
desc: Short-term research visits to leading foreign labs for early-career researchers.

name: PRASHAD
hi: पिलग्रिमेज रेजुवेनेशन एंड स्पिरिचुअल ऑगमेंटेशन ड्राइव
desc: Develops pilgrimage sites with better amenities and heritage-sensitive infrastructure.
bullets: Boosts spiritual tourism and local livelihoods

name: Jal Jeevan Mission
desc: Safe tap water to every rural household at 55 litres per capita per day.
bullets: 55 litres per person per day target
Quality, regular supply and community management

name: GOBAR-DHAN
desc: Converts cattle dung and organic waste into biogas and organic manure.
bullets: Encourages rural entrepreneurship in biogas plants

name: Rashtriya Gram Swaraj Abhiyan
desc: Strengthens Panchayati Raj Institutions with training and digital tools.

name: Mahila Sammaan Savings Certificate
desc: Government savings scheme for women with 7.5% quarterly compounded interest.
bullets: Easy closure and flexible account opening

name: PM Laghu Vyapari Maan Dhan Yojana
hi: पीएम लघु व्यापारी मान धन योजना
desc: Pension scheme for small traders and self-employed persons.

name: Atal Beemit Vyakti Kalyan Yojana
desc: Unemployment relief for insured persons who become unemployed.

name: Atal Pension Yojana
desc: Old age income security for unorganised sector workers aged 18 to 40.
bullets: Eligible for Indian citizens aged 18 to 40

name: Mahila Samriddhi Yojana
desc: Micro-enterprise loans for women entrepreneurs from poor backgrounds.
bullets: Accessible via banks, RRBs and NSFDC

name: PM Krishi Sinchayee Yojana
desc: Enhances water use efficiency at farm level through micro irrigation.

name: AI for All
desc: Online programme to raise public awareness and skills in Artificial Intelligence.
bullets: Focus on school students, youth, professionals

name: Jute Raw Material Bank
desc: Supplies jute raw materials at mill gate prices to artisans and manufacturers.

name: Vishwakarma Kaushal Samman Yojana
desc: Support for traditional artisans and craftspeople across recognised trades.

name: Atal Bhujal Yojana
desc: Sustainable groundwater management with community participation.

name: Mission Solar Charkha
desc: Solar Charkha Clusters for women and youth employment in rural areas.

name: Soil Health Card Scheme
desc: Cards giving farmers soil nutrient status and fertilizer recommendations.
bullets: Advises on fertilizer dosage and amendments
Soil samples collected and tested regularly

name: Startup India Seed Fund Scheme
desc: Financial assistance to early-stage startups for proof of concept and market entry.
bullets: Funding up to ₹50 lakh via incubators
For proof of concept and prototype development

name: PM SVANidhi
desc: Working-capital loans for street vendors with digital payment incentives.

name: Coir Udyami Yojana
desc: Credit-linked subsidy for setting up coir processing units.

name: Aatma Nirbhar Bharat Package
desc: Mission to promote Indian goods globally and achieve self-reliance.
bullets: Free food grains for the poor

name: National Quantum Mission
desc: Mission-mode push for quantum computing, communications and sensing.

name: PM Employment Generation Programme
desc: Credit-linked subsidy for micro-enterprise creation in manufacturing and services.

name: PM Anusuchit Jaati Abhyuday Yojana
desc: Scheduled Caste welfare covering education, entrepreneurship and area development.
bullets: Supports individual beneficiaries and community assets
Reduces service gaps in SC-majority localities
